jiraResponses.summary: Page Error When Merging Duplicate Candidates

latestComment.author: Kimmy Nguyen
latestComment.body: Hi David / Andrew Tse, Walmart is following up to confirm if we can provide an ETA of when they can expect a fix for this issue due to it affecting recruiters who might be merging candidates (as they noted, during testing it happened around 40% of the time) - please confirm so we can set expectations with the customer.
latestComment.tldr: Kimmy is asking David and Andrew Tse for a fix ETA on behalf of Walmart, who reports the duplicate-merge page error reproducing on roughly 40% of test merges.

jiraResponses.tldrSummary: Walmart escalation - Reopened. Page error on merging duplicate candidates is reproducing ~40% of the time in their testing after the HRPERSON-24735 fix; severity raised from Minor to Major on 8 Apr by Kimmy. Owner needs to set ETA expectations.

customerIssues.summary: Purged Job Application keeps an unassigned task when the awaiting task has been reassigned
customerIssues.tldrSummary: Reopened on 1 Apr after Purge Plans (HRREC-88211) was reverted from Production due to a regression. Airbus's Preview testing was successful pre-revert; they are awaiting Purge Plans reaching Prod again to confirm fix. Targeted re-deploy: 22 May Preview.

diagnosis.reasoning: Purge is not behaving as expected when the awaiting task has been reassigned; a fix has already been developed and is being delivered through Purge Plans.

customerIssues.summary: [To Fix] Skills and Automatic Activity Stream Comments Remaining After Job Application Purge
customerIssues.tldrSummary: PwC running Job Application purge with all PDTs except Link Between Person and the Job Application; automatic activity-stream system comments and Skills are not being purged. Triage proposes updating the Comments and Notifications PDT to include Event Record data plus a new IOP method to traverse to Candidate Skill Item.

diagnosis.reasoning: Purge is behaving as configured; modifying the Comments and Notifications for Job Application PDT to include Event Record information will resolve the issue.

customerIssues.summary: Prevent stuck inbox items for purged candidates in ready for hire
customerIssues.tldrSummary: ASML hit a job application with a pending Employment Agreement Review Documents inbox item assigned to candidate-as-self; the job application was purged in Ready for Hire / Staffing Event Completed and the task can no longer be actioned. Need to fix the purge logic in Ready for Hire to prevent additional stuck inbox items.

diagnosis.reasoning: System preventing action on a purged candidate is the expected behaviour for data integrity; the issue arises from the sequence of user actions, specifically purging with an incomplete BP step.

competitorNews.title: SmartRecruiters Introduces the Future of Hiring: From AI Agents to Autonomous Talent Acquisition
bullets: Winston Interview, an agentic interviewer providing first-round screening with consistent scored answers at scale, claims 75% reduction in time-to-decision.
Winston Chat embeds assessments and job-specific Q&A into candidate conversations, achieving up to 66% application completion rates.
Winston Companion is a conversational Q&A agent for recruiters and hiring managers; Winston Match adds sub-scores for education, skills, and experience.
Agentic CRM automatically surfaces, ranks, and re-engages candidates across email, SMS, and WhatsApp; native SAP SuccessFactors integration ships with the release.
Applicant fraud detection and an AI Disclosure surface land alongside, addressing global compliance and candidate transparency.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: SmartRecruiters and SAP SuccessFactors now ship a connected agentic stack; defend with HiredScore depth, Paradox conversational coverage, and Workday's unified HCM-recruiting telemetry.

competitorNews.title: SAP SuccessFactors 1H 2026 Release: Strengthening Connection Across HR and the Business
bullets: Joule expands into a connected network of agentic AI agents spanning recruiting, workforce administration, payroll, learning, performance, and talent development.
Native integration between recruiting and onboarding lands, with improved employee, manager, and HR team workflows.
Process clarity and compliance theme: governance and accuracy emphasised, including in agentic decisions.
Skills and talent development foundations strengthened for long-term growth.
Joule grows a workforce knowledge network for external expertise; redesigned 401(k) experience for U.S. employees.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: SAP positioning Joule as the cross-suite AI fabric directly mirrors Workday's HCM-platform story; counter with HiredScore + Paradox specificity and ROI proof points.

competitorNews.title: iCIMS Spring 2026 Release: Frontline AI, Hiring Automation, and Sourcing Insights
bullets: Frontline AI doubles down on high-volume, hourly, and frontline hiring workflows.
New automation across the candidate journey reduces manual recruiter work in repetitive workflows.
Sourcing insights surface enriched candidate signals to inform pipeline targeting.
Configurability improvements across the enterprise platform expand admin-tunable workflow logic.
Continued investment in candidate experience aligned to mid-market and enterprise segments.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: iCIMS reinforcing frontline / hourly hiring; watch overlap with HiredScore high-volume use cases and our hourly retail / healthcare segments.

competitorNews.title: Oracle Recruiting Cloud 26B Release: Career Coach, Activity Center, and Candidate Authenticity
bullets: Career Coach gains interview management agents, reducing recruiter coordination overhead.
Activity centre enhancements strengthen sourcing and candidate follow-up workflows.
Job Applicant Screening Advisor adds candidate authenticity features (early fraud signals).
Skill suggestions from job requisitions feed into automated recommendations.
Redwood Experience updates land for interview coordination and management surfaces.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: Oracle accelerating agentic interview management; Workday's Paradox-based scheduling plus HiredScore screening should be lead messaging for shared accounts and Oracle Taleo displacements.

competitorNews.title: Workable Launches Embedded AI Recruiting Agent for Job Intake, Sourcing, Screening, and Engagement
bullets: Workable Agent embeds inside the ATS to handle job brief creation, sourcing across 400M+ profiles, screening, and candidate engagement.
Structured job intake feature included free on all Recruiting plans, lowering the bar for AI-assisted reqs.
Agent evaluates candidates autonomously and is designed for EU AI Act compliance, with reasoning attached to every score and protected characteristics excluded.
Targets SMB and lower mid-market segments where Workable is strongest.
Positioning as 'agent in the ATS' rather than a separate copilot, matching the broader market shift to embedded AI.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: Workable bringing autonomous agentic AI down-market; less of a direct enterprise threat, but signals where mid-market expectations on AI-by-default will land in 12-18 months.
